Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache

Class MustacheResource

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.RestResource
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.ViewResource
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache.MustacheResource
public class MustacheResource extends ViewResource
Child-resource flavor of the MustacheMixin mixin.

Mounts as a routed child via @Rest(children=MustacheResource.class) under a parent at the subtree /mustache and renders raw Mustache templates by delegating to a shared MustacheDispatcher worker — the same flavor-neutral RawTemplateDispatcher implementation the mixin and servlet flavors hold, so the three forms cannot drift.

See Also:
  • MustacheMixin
  • MustacheServlet
  • ViewResource
  • Mustache View Support
  • REST Server — Composition (mixins, paths)
Since:
10.0.0

      protected MustacheResource(MustacheDispatcher worker)
      Worker constructor.
      Parameters:
      worker - The shared flavor-neutral Mustache dispatcher this child delegates raw dispatch to. Must not be null.

  • Method Details

    • dispatcher

      protected RawTemplateDispatcher dispatcher()
      Description copied from class: ViewResource
      Returns the per-engine RawTemplateDispatcher this child delegates raw template dispatch to.

      Typically the matching flavor-neutral <Engine>Dispatcher worker (which implements RawTemplateDispatcher). Never null.

      Specified by:
      dispatcher in class ViewResource
      Returns:
      The raw-template dispatcher. Never null.
